steps.title: Eliminate $x$ to get $y$ faster
steps.content: The question asks for $y$. Multiply the second equation by $4$ so the $x$-coefficients match: $$24x+4y=288.$$

steps.title: Solve and verify
steps.content: Divide by $3$ to get $y=80$. Check in the second equation: $$6x+80=72,$$ so $x=-\frac{4}{3}$. Substituting into the first equation gives $$24\left(-\frac{4}{3}\right)+80=48,$$ so $y=80$ is consistent.
